text.title: Agency Discovery Call Playbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Did the lead disclose a budget range?

conclusion.verdict: Send to nurture queue; revisit in 60 days.

branch.question: Is fit score ≥ 7 with decision-maker named?

conclusion.verdict: Hand off to proposal author with full writeup.
Schedule second call if score 4-6; decline if < 4.
